user.title: Sign in to Divoom
user.description: Sign in with your Divoom account to enumerate your devices. For each device the integration then picks the fastest working transport (local if the device supports it, otherwise cloud-relay).

pick_device.title: Pick a device
pick_device.description: Each device becomes its own entry. Add the flow again for the second one.

local_token.title: LocalToken for {name}
local_token.description: Times Gate exposes a LocalToken in its own settings menu — a number like 229930. Enter it here to talk to the device directly on your LAN. Leave blank to fall back to cloud-relay (works too, just a bit slower and needs internet).

reauth_confirm.title: Sign in again
reauth_confirm.description: The stored Divoom token was rejected. Re-enter your account credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Divoom cloud.
error.no_devices_found: No Divoom devices found on this account.
error.unknown_device: Selected device is no longer available.
error.local_token_rejected: Device rejected the LocalToken. Double-check the value in the Times Gate settings menu.
